历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9386 → 8891 → 28929 → 12558. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant drop in ranking, and in 2025 it rebounded to 12558. The fluctuations in the past two years have been large, with a baseline of about 12558 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan for Physics Category was 152 in 2022, 151 in 2023, 166 in 2024, 175 in 2025, and 143 in 2026, a reduction of about 18.3% compared to 2025. The decrease in enrollment slots will alleviate competition pressure, leading to a trend of ranking moving forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 31st, and in recent years it has been stable in the 29–32 range, belonging to the top-tier universities in China. On Douyin, the university's popularity ranking is 16th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention from applicants. The reputation evaluation documents show no major negative public opinion incidents for Hunan University in 2026, and the university's image is positive and stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, and Civil Engineering A-, with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, which aligns well with Hunan University's advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring applicants. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Sichuan is approximately 329,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 15.6% compared to 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition across the province. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, in the Central China region, and there is no significant regional preference or aversion among Sichuan applicants for cross-province applications. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Sichuan (143–175 for Physics Category), making it one of the 985 universities with higher enrollment numbers outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 12558, the approximately 18.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 (pushing the ranking forward), and the approximately 15.6% increase in Physics Category examinees in Sichuan (pushing the ranking backward), the two factors roughly offset each other, with a slight bias toward intensified competition. Given the university's high Douyin exposure and the continued popularity of its advantageous engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11380, with a range of 10880–11880.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10880–11880, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials Science, Chemistry, Journalism) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10880), you can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 11880), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the core and Tier 3 as backup.

The significant increase in enrollment slots will greatly alleviate competition pressure, causing the ranking to drop noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 31st, with a stable range of 29–32 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. On Douyin, its school popularity ranks 16th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention. In reputation evaluation documents, no major negative public opinion incidents for Hunan University in 2026 were found, indicating a positive and stable school image. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, etc., which highly match the majors enrolled in History Category (Economics, Business Administration, Law, etc.), highlighting strong strength in economics, management, and law disciplines.

专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot, while economics and management majors show differentiation and wait-and-see attitude but still have appeal. Hunan University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, in the Central China region, with no significant regional preference or aversion among Sichuan examinees for cross-province applications. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 2912, the substantial enrollment expansion of about 258.8% in 2026 (causing a significant drop in ranking), and the increase of about 15.6% in History Category examinees in Sichuan (also causing a drop in ranking), the expansion effect dominates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will drop significantly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7234, with a range of 6734–7734.
